title: Polycam Camera JSON Schema
description: Camera parameters generated per frame when exporting in PLYCM format

fx.description: The focal length on the x axis.

fy.description: The focal length on the y axis.

cx.description: The optical center offset on the x axis.

cy.description: The optical center offset on the y axis.

width.description: Resolution width of the RGB images.

height.description: Resolution height of the RGB images.

blur_score.description: Set to 1.0, as blurry frames are prerejected.

image_path.description: Relative path to the RGB image.

depth_path.description: Relative path to the associated depth map.
